title: Becton Dickinson India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Becton Dickinson India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Becton Dickinson India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Becton Dickinson India:
Becton Dickinson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Becton Dickinson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
